calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-JAN-30-2013:
Plaintiff NP APARTMENTS, a Delaware LLC is represented by Sister Aline Estournes who is present with Attorney Stephen Lightfoot;
Defendant MARY E. GLYNN is present with Attorney Joseph J. Catalano representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Jonathan Polland, litigants, and respective counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed.

The trial date of FEB-04-2013 is vacated.
